task_completion.description: Join the Jitsi Meet session 'TrainingSession' as 'Training Lead'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jitsi Meet web interface is visible. The room name should indicate 'TrainingSession' and the user's display name should be set to 'Training Lead' (visible in the pre-join screen, participant list, or self-view thumbnail).

task_completion.description: Open the keyboard shortcuts overlay in Jitsi Meet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Meet 'Keyboard Shortcuts' modal/overlay is visible on the screen, displaying a list of keys and their functions.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the shortcuts overlay to /home/ga/shortcuts_evidence.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal (e.g., ls command), or image viewer shows that 'shortcuts_evidence.png' exists in /home/ga/ and contains the image of the shortcuts overlay.
A text editor (like gedit, nano, or VS Code) or terminal output (like cat) showing the file 'shortcuts_reference.txt' located in /home/ga/.

task_completion.description: Document the specific shortcuts for Microphone, Camera, and Filmstrip in the required format
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'shortcuts_reference.txt' list the shortcuts using the format '[Key] - [Description]'. It must specifically include M (Microphone), V (Camera), and F (Filmstrip).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Jitsi Meet web application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Jitsi Meet interface in a web browser, confirming the agent didn't just write the text file from prior knowledge without opening the app.

integrity.description: The screenshot evidence file is a genuine image capture
integrity.visual_evidence: The shortcuts_evidence.png file should appear as a real screenshot of the desktop or browser window containing the Jitsi overlay, not a manually constructed text file or downloaded stock image.

integrity.description: Agent derived shortcuts from the interface rather than hallucinating
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the agent actually viewing the shortcuts overlay in Jitsi Meet before or while creating the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct Jitsi Meet keyboard shortcuts are: 'M' (Mute or unmute your microphone), 'V' (Start or stop your camera), and 'F' (Show or hide video thumbnails). The text file must document these specific keys (case-insensitive) using the format '[Key] - [Description]'.
